node.statement: (Artin-Wedderburn decomposition of commutant). Since π_φ(A)' is a finite-dimensional von Neumann algebra (equivalently, a finite-dimensional C*-algebra), by the Artin-Wedderburn theorem it is *-isomorphic to a direct sum of full matrix algebras: π_φ(A)' ≅ M_{n_1}(C) ⊕ M_{n_2}(C) ⊕ ... ⊕ M_{n_k}(C) for unique integers n_1, ..., n_k ≥ 1 (up to reordering). Here k is the number of minimal central projections in π_φ(A)'.
